svg:
<title id="title>Authorization Service Failure Modes <desc" id="desc">Authorization failure modes: stale entitlements, policy rollout issues, over-permissive defaults, and authorization bypass
<rect width="900" height="600" fill="var(--bg-panel, #f8fafc)/>
Authorization Service Failure Modes <text" x="450" y="58 text-anchor="middle" font-size="13 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b)">Stale entitlements, policy rollout issues, over-permissive defaults, and bypass
<text x="235 y="110" text-anchor="middle font-size="14" font-weight="bold fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444">1. Stale Entitlements
<text x="120 y="175" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>User has Role <text" x="120" y="190 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#bfdbfe">Admin role <text x="120 y="203" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="#bfdbfe>Cached decision
<text x="200 y="170" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>Role revoked
<rect" x="225" y="150 width="120" height="60" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #ef4444)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #b91c1c)" stroke-width="2/> <text" x="285" y="175 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Cache Not Updated <text x="285 y="190" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#fca5a5>TTL: 5 min <text" x="285" y="203 text-anchor="middle" font-size="7 fill="#fca5a5">Still allows!
<text x="235 y="290" text-anchor="middle font-size="10" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>User retains access after role removal! <text" x="235" y="310 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b">Cause: Cache TTL too long, no invalidation <text x="235 y="330" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981>Fix: Shorter TTL, push invalidation on change
<rect" x="460" y="85 width="410" height="240" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="var(--border-theme, #f59e0b)" stroke-width="2/> 2. Policy Rollout Issues
<rect" x="480" y="135 width="370" height="140" rx="6" fill="var(--bg-panel-soft, #fffbeb)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #fcd34d)" stroke-width="1/>
<rect" x="490" y="150 width="110" height="60" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #10b981)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #059669)" stroke-width="1/> <text" x="545" y="175 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Service A <text x="545 y="190" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#6ee7b7>Policy v1 <text" x="545" y="203 text-anchor="middle" font-size="7 fill="#6ee7b7">Allows X
<text x="675 y="175" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Service B <text" x="675" y="190 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#fcd34d">Policy v2 <text x="675 y="203" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="#fcd34d>Denies X
<text x="750 y="170" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>Inconsistent!
<rect" x="775" y="150 width="65" height="60" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #10b981)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #059669)" stroke-width="1/> <text" x="807" y="175 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Service C <text x="807 y="190" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#6ee7b7>Policy v1
<text" x="665" y="290 text-anchor="middle" font-size="10 fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444">Inconsistent enforcement across services! <text x="665 y="310" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b>Cause: Gradual rollout, version skew <text" x="665" y="330 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981">Fix: Coordinated rollout, canary policy
<text x="235 y="365" text-anchor="middle font-size="14" font-weight="bold fill="var(--text-theme, #8b5cf6">3. Over-Permissive Defaults
<text x="120 y="420" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>New Resource <text" x="120" y="435 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#c4b5fd">Created
<line x1="185 y1="425" x2="215 y2="425" stroke="var(--text-theme, #ef4444)" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow-red)/> No policy
<text x="285 y="420" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Default: ALLOW <text" x="285" y="435 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#fca5a5">Anyone can access!
<text x="235 y="495" text-anchor="middle font-size="10" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>New resources exposed by default! <text" x="235" y="515 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b">Cause: Default-allow instead of default-deny <text x="235 y="535" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981>Fix: Default-deny, explicit grants only
<rect" x="460" y="340 width="410" height="240" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="var(--border-theme, #10b981)" stroke-width="2/> 4. Authorization Bypass
<rect" x="480" y="380 width="370" height="140" rx="6" fill="var(--bg-panel-soft, #ecfdf5)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #6ee7b7)" stroke-width="1/>
<rect" x="490" y="395 width="100" height="60" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #10b981)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #059669)" stroke-width="1/> <text" x="540" y="420 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">API Gateway <text x="540 y="435" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#6ee7b7>Checks authz
<text x="610 y="415" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b>Allowed
<rect" x="635" y="395 width="100" height="60" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #3b82f6)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #1e40af)" stroke-width="1/> <text" x="685" y="420 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Internal API <text x="685 y="435" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#bfdbfe>No check!
<text x="755 y="415" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>Direct access
<rect" x="780" y="395 width="60" height="60" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #ef4444)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #b91c1c)" stroke-width="2/> <text" x="810" y="425 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Data <text x="810 y="443" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="#fca5a5>Exposed!
<text" x="665" y="495 text-anchor="middle" font-size="10 fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444">Internal APIs bypass gateway authz! <text x="665 y="515" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b>Cause: Authz only at gateway, not service <text" x="665" y="535 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981">Fix: Defense in depth, service-level checks
<marker id="arrow" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5 orient="auto"> <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b)"/>
<marker id="arrow-red" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5 orient="auto"> <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7 fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444)"/>
